description_long: This nightstand features a rectangular top surface with a small lamp and a decorative star-shaped base, as well as a small object resembling a book or notepad. The front face includes a single drawer with a round knob and a cabinet door below, also with a matching knob. The body of the nightstand has a subtly curved profile, giving it a modern yet classic appearance. The legs are short and blocky, providing stable support. The surface appears to be painted or finished in a light, neutral color, likely wood or MDF. The overall design is functional, with storage space and a flat surface for placing items, making it suitable for use in residential or hospitality settings.
description: A light-colored nightstand with a drawer, cabinet door, and a lamp on top, featuring curved sides and block feet.
description_view_0: Side view showing the flat side panel, lamp, and a small object on the top surface.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the drawer with a knob, cabinet door, and the lamp with a star-shaped base.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear look at the lamp and the side panel, minimal visible hardware.
description_view_3: Rear view highlighting the curved back panel and the lamp, with no visible handles or openings.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
